calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-02-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Petitioner: Marilyn Lo, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Riley Jason Tam.
Objections to the proposed change of name of the Minor were made at the hearing by the Minor's father Jason Tam.
Parties were sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted as modified in court.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Riley Jason Lo Tam.
Decree signed in open court.
